CREATE TABLE test_randBernoulli (id UInt64, success UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_randBernoulli VALUES (1, randBernoulli(0.0)), (2, randBernoulli(0.5)), (3, randBernoulli(1.0));
SELECT id, success FROM test_randBernoulli WHERE success = 1;
SELECT id, success FROM test_randBernoulli WHERE success = 0 AND id < 3;
SELECT AVG(success) FROM (SELECT randBernoulli(0.7) AS success FROM numbers(1000));
CREATE TABLE random_numbers AS SELECT id, randBernoulli(0.6) AS random_value FROM numbers(1000);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, sum(random_value) AS success_count FROM random_numbers GROUP BY random_value;
SELECT id, (SELECT randBernoulli(0.3) FROM numbers(3)) AS rand_value FROM numbers(5);
SELECT id, randBernoulli(probability) FROM (SELECT id, 0.1 AS probability FROM numbers(10)) WHERE id % 2 = 0;
WITH (SELECT avg(success) FROM (SELECT randBernoulli(0.8) AS success FROM numbers(100))) AS avg_success SELECT COUNT(*) FROM random_numbers WHERE random_value > avg_success;
SELECT id, (SELECT count() FROM test_randBernoulli WHERE success = 1) AS success_count FROM test_randBernoulli;
CREATE TABLE aggregated_results AS SELECT probability, COUNT(*) as occurences FROM (SELECT randBernoulli(probability) AS result, 0.4 AS probability FROM numbers(1000)) GROUP BY probability, result;
